summary: Added a generated-art Chapter Crew Formation layer to the Path Map Chapter Crew Relay so chapter bots read as a compact game roster with portrait slots, ranks, readiness meters, and local-only handoff controls.

queries: game UI crew management dashboard character roster progress lanes inspiration
agent dashboard avatar roster gamification UI inspiration
idle game management dashboard upgrade tree visual design
pattern_notes: Roster surfaces should make ownership, status, and next action visible without adding cognitive load.
Game crew screens use portrait slots, ranks, meters, and formation boards to communicate readiness at a glance.
Standalone repos need the roster layer to be data-derived from agent visuals instead of hard-coded to one company.

generated_asset.prompt_summary: Premium dark sci-fi tactical crew formation console backdrop with teal/amber routing lines, empty agent slots, no text, no logos.

ui_contract: Render a path-chapter-crew-formation section inside Chapter Crew Relay.
Use generated chapter-crew-formation-20260618.png as the roster backdrop.
Render one path-chapter-crew-slot per derived crew record using existing agent portraits.
Render path-chapter-crew-rank badges and path-chapter-crew-readiness meters.
Keep Q/COM/TRL controls local-only and unchanged.
Register the generated backdrop in the Visual Asset Vault system assets.

red_green.red: pytest tests\test_agent_company_atlas_path_chapter_crew_relay.py -q failed before formation wiring on missing path-chapter-crew-formation markup.
red_green.green: pytest tests\test_agent_company_atlas_path_chapter_crew_relay.py -q passed after formation markup, styles, generated asset, docs, asset vault registration, and cache token wiring.

browser_green_route.evidence: Rendered Chapter Crew Relay with one Chapter Crew Formation board, generated backdrop chapter-crew-formation-20260618.png, one portrait slot for the selected lane owner, rank badge, readiness meter, existing agent card, Asset Vault registration, local Q command data for digital_products_templates_plugins, no horizontal overflow, and zero console errors.

responsive.evidence: Browser sweep at 390x820, 820x900, 1280x900, and 1600x1000 kept the formation board, portrait slot, rank badge, readiness meter, generated backdrop, local Q control, zero bad rectangles, zero horizontal overflow, and zero console errors.
